CREATE TABLE test_logTrace (id UInt32, message String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_logTrace VALUES (1, 'Initial logTrace message');
SELECT logTrace((SELECT message FROM test_logTrace WHERE id = 1));
SELECT logTrace(CONCAT('Log message: ', toString(id))) FROM test_logTrace;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, 100, 'User 100 log entry'), (2, 200, 'User 200 log entry');
SELECT logTrace(description) FROM test_join WHERE user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM test_join);
SELECT logTrace('Log for User ' || user_id || ': ' || description) FROM test_join;
CREATE TABLE test_subquery (id UInt32, logInfo String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_subquery VALUES (1, 'Subquery log entry');
SELECT logTrace((SELECT logInfo FROM test_subquery WHERE id = 1)) FROM test_subquery;
SELECT logTrace('Log message with random number: ' || random()) FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10;
SELECT logTrace('Count of logs: ' || count(*)) FROM test_logTrace;
CREATE TABLE complex_log (id UInt32, log_message String, log_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY log_time;
INSERT INTO complex_log VALUES (1, 'Log A', now()), (2, 'Log B', now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
SELECT logTrace(('Log Entry: ' || log_message) FROM complex_log WHERE log_time > now() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR;
SELECT logTrace((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_logTrace)) INTO log_message; INSERT INTO complex_log VALUES (3, log_message, now());
